     the Fermi energy is     2.3466 ev

!    total energy              =   -8074.67205360 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          3.4E-10 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.27294000 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =   -8074.39911360 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -207403.19537945 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  104569.09220402 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -3118.72393169 Ry
     ewald contribution        =   97880.34050337 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -1.91250985 Ry

     absolute magnetization    =    36.35 Bohr mag/cell
